title: Woman Hater
writer: Robert Westerby, Nicholas Phipps, Alec Coppel
actors: Stewart Granger, Edwige Feuillère, Ronald Squire
plot: Terence is a bachelor who doesn't have much use for women. He meets Colette and takes a dislike to her. He pretends to be a real-estate agent trying to sell her his country estate, all the while planning to expose her.
